overview: A full-stack corporate merchandise website for a manufacturer of t-shirts, caps, and bags. Features a public storefront with home, product catalog (search & filter), and contact page, plus a complete admin panel for managing products.
features: Home page with hero, product showcase, and company info
Product catalog with real-time search and category/price filters
Product detail view with description, sizes, and colors
Contact page with phone, WhatsApp, and email links plus contact form
Admin panel with login and product management (add, edit, delete)
Image upload for products via object storage
Mobile-friendly, accessible UI for all literacy levels
